title: Girls on the Loose
writer: Alan Friedman, Julian Harmon, Dorothy Raison
actors: Mara Corday, Lita Milan, Barbara Bostock
plot: Vera (Mara Corday) runs a nightclub that's really a front for her secret operation: an all-female crime ring that's been pulling off heist after heist. The gang does a major job with the help of Agnes (Abby Dalton), a new recruit ...
